title: Standalone skill packages manifest
description: Groups the standalone agentic skills into named packages the create-mercato-app installer can offer. The 'core' package is always installed; 'default' lists packages installed on an accept-defaults run.

default.description: Package names installed when the user accepts defaults / runs non-interactively.

skills.description: Skill folder names (under .ai/skills/) belonging to this package.

extraFiles.description: Package-owned files living under a skill not in this package (paths relative to .ai/skills/). Shipped only when this package is selected.
